text: Hey Jarvis, run through my schedule for today, please.
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, July 13. No work meetings today. You have FaceTime call with Tom & Linda in Naperville and neighborhood BBQ at Dave's place.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. I've got the schedule covered. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. That is a clean implementation. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I can pull more research papers.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Bedtime can be a challenge. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: I've mapped the locations. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Checking on some house maintenance items. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Automations are great when they work. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Let's organize the menu. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Writing scripts to process image datasets. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. Love going down these rabbit holes.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Social breaks are great. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the kitchen sink area has a problem. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that putting together our grocery list. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Healthy choices are great. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
